isolation.cleanBaseline: Cleared cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, and IndexedDB before testing

assertions.title: Generation Progress screen renders after Create Keyset form with phase checklist and progress bar

steps.action: Open /create and submit Create Keyset form with keyset name and blank nsec

steps.expected: Shows title, stepper with step 1 active, 3 phases, and overall progress
steps.observed: Screen showed heading 'Generation Progress' with phases 'Generate New Key', 'Split Initial Shares', 'Prepare Shares for Setup' and text '0 of 3 phases'

assertions.title: Generation Progress auto-transitions to Create Profile screen on completion

steps.action: Wait on /create/progress for simulated generation completion

steps.observed: Create Profile screen rendered with stepper showing progression to step 2

assertions.title: Full Create flow including generation progress produces no console errors

steps.expected: Flow completes end-to-end with no console errors or unhandled exceptions
steps.observed: Flow completed to dashboard; browser errors output remained empty

steps.action: Check browser error log after completing flow

assertions.title: Create Keyset form shows inline validation errors

steps.action: On /create, enter invalid nsec (not-a-valid-nsec) and submit
steps.expected: Inline validation appears and page does not navigate
steps.observed: Stayed on http://127.0.0.1:5173/create with inline error text 'Invalid nsec format. Must be a valid Nostr private key.'

steps.expected: Affected field shows error state (red border/error text)
steps.observed: Error text rendered below nsec field and form remained on Create Keyset

assertions.title: Full Create-to-Dashboard flow works end-to-end (Welcome -> Create -> Profile -> Distribute -> Complete -> Dashboard)

steps.action: Start at Welcome and click New Keyset
steps.observed: Welcome at / then Create Keyset at http://127.0.0.1:5173/create

steps.expected: Progress through Generation Progress, Create Profile, Distribute Shares, Distribution Complete

steps.action: Finish distribution and land on dashboard
steps.expected: Dashboard shows correct group name and signer status
steps.observed: Reached /dashboard/1c549e12cc85d7e1c8ff1087b1e3ba688ab794b630042fc2775f65a6282be0b9 with 'Create Core Group' and signer status 'Running'

steps.action: Check for console errors across flow

frictions.description: On Distribution Complete, 'Finish Distribution' was initially disabled until each remote share QR modal was opened and dismissed with 'Done' on Distribute Shares.
frictions.resolution: Returned to /create/distribute, opened both QR modals, clicked Done for each, then continued to /create/complete where Finish Distribution became enabled.

frictions.description: Generation Progress auto-transition is quick, making it easy to miss evidence capture if delayed.
frictions.resolution: Captured screenshot immediately after reaching /create/progress and before waiting for auto-transition.

summary: Tested 5 assertions (VAL-CREATE-001/002/003/004 and VAL-CROSS-002): all 5 passed. Full create-to-dashboard path is navigable in isolated session with no console errors observed.
